ab: dasun ku amu munacang kilim madadaingaz.
ch: A:今天我帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Today I am taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說布農語。
en: B: Okay! We’re going to speak Bunun to the seniors.
A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: ai maqanciap amu malasBunun! ai mailmananu’!
ch: B:你們會說布農語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B:  You speak Bunun! That’s great!

ab: ina dasun ku amu munha’an quma malkamaduq.
ch: A:走 今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A: Let’s go. Today we are going to take you to work in the rice fields.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: amin sopa di pidailaz, aun na iskukuza tu qaimangsut panpungulan madas.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: u, sinsi’, aminunin zami madas sa qaimangsut.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: su’ua ka siza’ i paqpaq qa.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.
B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: ina’, munha’an ata haip luluman ni tusmumut tu luluman.
en: A: We are going to the zoo today.

ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: dian tidailaz, na mabaliv ata kipu’.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: ma’aq qa tantangaus sa amin qai lauqi, ma’aq qa tankinuz za amin qai ivut, amin ata anakanak sadu.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: ni tu makua, ipin asu sadu lauqi’.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: maqi tasbanin tas’a zikang, asa tu mucuqis muniti mu’ampuk.
ch: A:我們一個小時後,回來集合。
en: A: We’ll meet back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.
A: What did you see today?

ab: sadu cak madia ivut, haizang madia tu luqi’.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: atala’in cak, mamuqu’ nak ka bantac.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!
A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: makumbu’ ita a danum, malau ata iti lingqaul ina.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
